metadata.description: Internal plugins for JetDevs app development and migrations

plugins.name: core-sdk
plugins.description: Migrate NextJS modules to @jetdevs/core SDK extension pattern in a single request

plugins.name: typescript-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for code intelligence (diagnostics, go to definition, find references)

plugins.name: browser-testing
plugins.description: Playwright E2E testing patterns enforcing real database testing, error monitoring with denylist, and tRPC batch inspection

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Development workflow skills for specs, commits, code indexing, and spec reviews

plugins.name: cadra
plugins.description: CadraOS AI SaaS platform development - SDK, OpenAPI, agent execution, and platform features

plugins.name: slides
plugins.description: Slides presentation editor and Design Studio development - canvas, variables, templates, and dual-mode design

plugins.name: crm
plugins.description: Yobo CRM development - modules, data tables, inline editing, lifecycles, messaging, UI/UX design system
